## Infrastructure Change

### Summary
> What does this infrastructure change accomplish?

---

### Description
> What this changes, why it was needed, and how it works.

---

### Testing
> How was this tested? What evidence shows it works correctly?

---

### Impact Assessment
> Breaking changes? Components affected? Rollback plan?

---

### Checklist
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Testing complete (migration tested, workflow triggered, or config validated)
- [ ] Code follows project standards
